name: config-sync --check confirms every catalog rule has projectable options for its third-party tools (nothing missing)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/config-sync.sh" --check 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -qE 'config-sync rules=[0-9]+ materialized=[0-9]+ needs_mapping=0' e.txt && echo nothing-missing 1>&2
